incidentSummary: Consumer lag grew steadily because inventory-service processing throughput was intentionally reduced.

rootCauseHypotheses.cause: consumer lag simulation added per-message processing delay
rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: Lag mode flag appeared in logs and lag/processing duration metrics increased together while broker remained healthy.

performanceFindings: Backlog accumulated on order-created topic partitions and end-to-end event latency increased.
recommendedActions: Define autoscaling and lag-threshold alerts for sustained backlog growth.
